name: Distance
remarks: Distance stores, parses and formats distances in real world units.

constructors.name: Distance(Double)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the structure.

constructors.name: Distance(Double, Distance.UnitType)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the structure.

params.name: distance
params.doc: The distance in the specified units.

throws.when: Thrown if an invalid unit type is specified.

methods.name: CompareTo
methods.summary: Compares the current object with another object of the same type.

params.name: other
params.doc: The object to be compared with the current object.

returns.doc: A 32-bit signed integer that indicates the relative order of the objects being compared.The return value has the following meanings:ValueMeaningLess than zeroThe current object is less than the other object.ZeroThe current object is equal to the other object.Greater than zeroThe current object is greater than the other object.

methods.name: ConvertTo
methods.summary: Converts the distance to the specified units.

returns.doc: The distance in the specified units.

methods.name: Equals(Object)
methods.summary: Indicates whether the current instance and the specified object are equal.

params.name: obj
params.doc: The object to be compared with the current object.

returns.doc: True if the specified object and the current instance are of the same type and represent the same value; otherwise, false.

methods.name: Equals(Distance)
methods.summary: Indicates whether the current object is equal to another object of the same type.

params.name: other
params.doc: The object to be compared with the current object.

returns.doc: True if the current object is equal to the other object; otherwise, false.

methods.name: FromDecimalString(String)
methods.summary: Creates a distance from a decimal string representation.

returns.doc: The representation of the specified distance.

throws.when: Thrown if the text does not represent a distance.

methods.signature: public static Distance FromDecimalString(string text, IFormatProvider formatProvider)
methods.summary: Creates a distance from a decimal string representation.

returns.doc: The representation of the specified distance.

throws.when: Thrown if the text does not represent a distance.

methods.signature: public static Distance FromDecimalString(string text, IFormatProvider formatProvider, Distance.UnitType unitType)
methods.summary: Creates a distance from a decimal string representation.

params.name: unitType
params.doc: The unit type of the distance to parse.

returns.doc: The representation of the specified distance.

throws.when: Thrown if the text does not represent a distance.
Thrown if an invalid unit type is specified.

methods.summary: Creates a distance from a string representation of fractional feet and inches.

returns.doc: The representation of the specified distance.

throws.when: Thrown if the text does not represent a distance.

methods.summary: Creates a distance from a string representation of fractional feet and inches.

params.name: unitType
params.doc: The unit type of the distance to parse.

returns.doc: The representation of the specified distance.

throws.when: Thrown if the text does not represent a distance.

methods.name: GetHashCode
methods.summary: Returns the hash code for the current instance.

returns.doc: A 32-bit signed integer that is the hash code for the current instance.

methods.name: Parse(String)
methods.summary: Parses a distance from a string representation using the current unit type and culture.

returns.doc: The representation of the specified distance.

throws.when: Thrown if the text does not represent a distance.

methods.name: Parse(String, IFormatProvider)
methods.signature: public static Distance Parse(string text, IFormatProvider formatProvider)
methods.summary: Parses a distance from a string representation using the current unit type and the given culture.

returns.doc: The representation of the specified distance.

throws.when: Thrown if the text does not represent a distance.

methods.name: Parse(String, IFormatProvider, Distance.UnitType)
methods.signature: public static Distance Parse(string text, IFormatProvider formatProvider, Distance.UnitType unitType)
methods.summary: Parses a distance from a string representation using the given unit type and culture.

params.name: unitType
params.doc: The unit type of the distance to parse. Determines the parsing process.

returns.doc: The representation of the specified distance.

throws.when: Thrown if the text does not represent a distance.
Thrown if an invalid unit type is specified.

methods.name: TryParse(String, Distance.)
methods.signature: public static bool TryParse(string text, out Distance result)
methods.summary: Attempts to parse a distance from a string representation using the current units.

params.name: result
params.doc: The output variable for the result.

returns.doc: A boolean value indicating whether the operation succeeded.

methods.name: TryParse(String, IFormatProvider, Distance.UnitType, Distance.)
methods.signature: public static bool TryParse(string text, IFormatProvider formatProvider, Distance.UnitType defaultUnitType, out Distance result)
methods.summary: Attempts to parse a distance from a string representation using the current units.

params.name: defaultUnitType
params.doc: The default unit type if the unit cannot be determined.

params.name: result
params.doc: The output variable for the result.

throws.when: Thrown if an invalid unit type is specified.

properties.name: CurrentUnitType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the current unit type.

properties.name: Millimeters
properties.summary: Gets or sets the distance in millimeters.

properties.name: UseFractionalFormat
properties.summary: Gets or sets a boolean value indicating whether to use the fractional format for US imperial units.

properties.name: UseUnitsInDecimalString
properties.summary: Gets or sets a boolean value indicating whether to use units in the decimal string representation.

properties.name: Value
properties.summary: Gets or sets the distance value in current units.
